name: debrief
description: Local-first meeting capture for macOS: mixes microphone + system loopback audio and transcribes on-device with Whisper (Metal, fully local, no API key).
author: Stallin

scripts.test: node test/wav.test.js && node test/dedup.test.js && node test/summary.test.js && node test/vad.test.js && node test/glossary.test.js && node test/segmenter.test.js && node test/analytics.test.js && node test/email.test.js && node test/actions.test.js && node test/diarize.test.js && node test/speakers.test.js && node test/crm.test.js && node test/search.test.js && node test/ask.test.js && node test/briefs.test.js && node test/bleed.test.js && node test/voiceid.test.js && node test/cluster.test.js && node test/tags.test.js

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Debrief records your microphone so it can transcribe your side of meetings on-device.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Debrief captures system audio so it can transcribe the other participants on-device.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Debrief uses screen-audio capture to record meeting audio. No video is stored.
